title: pecteilis crinifera
intro: Pecteilis crinifera, also known as the Orchid Lily or Dendrobium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pecteilis crinifera include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or dried and encapsulated for oral consumption.
